author: Saeed Vaziry
message:
Improve PR merge flow and confirmation UX in tab-focused toolbar (#897)

* Improve PR merge flow and confirmation UX in tab-focused toolbar

* Show retry chip for unavailable PRs and toast on merge failures

Separate base-branch checkout from the merge so a failed switch surfaces its own toast without blocking the merge success message. Render a retryable chip for the unavailable pull request state instead of hiding it.

* Remove flaky project picker cancel-snapshot test

author: Saeed Vaziry
message:
Add AI-powered repository actions (#895)

* Add AI-powered repository actions

* Suppress provider hook notifications for background repository actions

Clear MUXY_PANE_ID for background metadata generation so global Claude
Code, Codex, and other provider hooks skip pane lifecycle events. Fix
Claude Code empty --tools argument passing.

author: Agustin Zamar
message:
feat: add muxy.gh service for GitHub user API (#884)

* feat: add muxy.gh service for GitHub user API

Adds muxy.gh.user() that returns authenticated GitHub user info
(login, name, avatarUrl) with 5-minute in-memory cache.

- New ghRead permission for secure access
- MuxyAPIGh.swift: user() implementation with TTL cache
- GhDTO.swift: DTO conversion for GitHubUser
- MuxyAPIDispatcher: gh.* verb routing
- Extension bridges: JS and WebBridge expose muxy.gh

Replaces direct gh api user calls in extensions with native API.

* refactor: consolidate GitHub user fetch behind GhUserService

Make muxy.gh.user() account-global (drop unused project/context) and
share one fetch with GitRepositoryService; document gh:read and muxy.gh.

---------

Co-authored-by: Saeed Vaziry <mr.saeedvaziry@gmail.com>

author: Ivan Dergachev
message: Avoid conflicting Codex hook configs (#878)

author: Agustin Zamar
message:
Scale status bar with UI size setting (#882)

* Scale status bar with UI size setting

Status bar fonts and height were hardcoded and ignored the Interface
Size setting. Route them through UIMetrics and add a Huge preset (1.40x).

* Fix Huge segments overflow in size picker

Segmented picker had a fixed 210pt width, clipping the 4th segment
(Huge). Remove the width constraint so the picker self-sizes.

author: Saeed Vaziry
message:
Split MainWindow body to fix slow release compile

The single body modifier chain took 26s to type-check locally and
minutes in release, non-deterministically stalling x86_64 CI builds.

author: Saeed Vaziry
message: Revert x86_64 to macos-26; native Intel was slower than cross-compile

author: Saeed Vaziry
message: Drop Select Xcode step; macos-26 lacks Xcode 16.4, defaults already work

author: Saeed Vaziry
message: Build x86_64 natively on macos-15-intel to fix slow release cross-compile

author: Jude
message:
Fix terminal scroll after window regains focus (#871)

* Fix terminal scroll after window regains focus

Re-sync the Ghostty surface focus on NSWindow.didBecomeKey so mouse
scroll reaches TUIs again without needing an extra click in the pane.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Reset terminal focus on window resign key

Derive surface focus from window key state and re-sync on both
didBecomeKey and didResignKey so refocus after losing key re-applies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

message:
Add keyboard shortcuts to create and remove worktrees (#864)

* Add keyboard shortcuts to create and remove worktrees
